entity.summary: Non-custodial decentralized exchange in the Baby Doge ecosystem, launched on BNB Smart Chain in October 2022 with token swaps, liquidity pools, farms, and staking products.
entity.notes: CoinPaprika, CoinGecko, and Algebra-style database rows are modeled as one protocol-level BabyDogeSwap entity. Current first-party documentation and application material support active status.

events.title: BabyDogeSwap launched on BNB Smart Chain
events.description: The Baby Doge ecosystem launched its non-custodial decentralized exchange with swaps and initial liquidity-farming products.
events.notes: Contemporary reporting preserves the official social announcement and exact launch date; current documentation confirms the same protocol identity.

evidence.title: BabyDoge officially launches Baby Doge Swap
evidence.notes: Contemporary report embeds and quotes the official BabyDoge announcement that the DEX went live on October 6, 2022.

evidence.title: BabyDogeSwap introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes the active non-custodial BNB Smart Chain exchange, swaps, farms, pools, and fee structure.

evidence.title: BabyDogeSwap smart-contract factory
evidence.notes: First-party developer documentation identifies the exchange factory and its Uniswap v2-derived architecture.

evidence.title: BabyDogeSwap exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current exchange profile corroborates the 2022 establishment year and continuing market identity.
